name: Zakarpattia Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the upper field — the Carpathian sky
the lower field — the Carpathian sun and wheat

description: A horizontal bicolour of blue over yellow with the coat of arms of Zakarpattia Oblast centred.
history: Officially adopted on 27 February 2009. Zakarpattia (Transcarpathia) is the trans-Carpathian region of westernmost Ukraine, historically part of Hungary, Czechoslovakia, and briefly an independent Carpatho-Ukraine (March 1939).

features.role: arms of Zakarpattia Oblast — bear and stripes
